title: Clear Junction to support institutional access to Agent's pound sterling stablecoin GBPA
message_html: Clear Junction to support institutional access to Agent's pound sterling stablecoin GBPA ...
snippet: Clear Junction Group, a global payments infrastructure provider serving financial institutions and cryptoasset businesses, has announced a UK-focused partnership between Clear Junction Digital Limited and Agant to support institutional access to GBPA, Agant’s Pound sterling stablecoin.
